real_prompts: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and a premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
Create a task management app where users can create projects, add tasks with deadlines, assign tasks to teammates, and managers can see team progress.
Build a blog platform where authors can write and publish posts, readers can comment, and admins can moderate comments.
I need an inventory management system for a small warehouse: track products, stock levels, suppliers, and let managers generate low-stock reports.
Build a simple booking app for a hair salon: customers book appointments, stylists see their schedule, owner sees revenue reports.
Create an event ticketing platform: organizers create events, attendees buy tickets, and there's a premium tier for organizers with advanced analytics.
Build a learning management system with courses, lessons, student enrollment, instructor course creation, and admin oversight of all courses.
I want a real estate listing site: agents post property listings, buyers can save favorites and contact agents, admin approves new listings.
Build a freelancer marketplace: freelancers create profiles and gigs, clients post jobs and hire freelancers, admin handles disputes.
Create a gym membership management app: members book classes, trainers manage their class schedules, admin manages memberships and payments.

vague: I want something like Instagram but better.
conflicting: Build an app with no login required, but admins need role-based access control to manage other users.
Create a free app with no payment features, but include a premium subscription tier with Stripe payments.
Build a public app where anyone can view everything, but also make all data private and only visible to the owner.
incomplete: I need an app for my business with users and some data.
Make an app with a dashboard and reports but I'm not sure what data yet.
Build something for tracking stuff between team members.
